name: Foxtail Millet Pasta
shortDesc: Healthy and tasty pasta made from foxtail millet.
description: Enjoy guilt-free pasta! Our Foxtail Millet Pasta is made with 100% natural ingredients, free from maida and preservatives. It's rich in fiber and proteins, making it a perfect healthy meal for kids and adults alike.

name: Ragi Noodles
shortDesc: Delicious noodles packed with the goodness of Ragi.
description: A perfect blend of taste and health. These Ragi Noodles are an excellent source of calcium and iron, providing a nutritious alternative to regular wheat noodles.

name: Bajra Khichdi Mix
shortDesc: Ready-to-cook healthy Bajra Khichdi.
description: Wholesome and comforting! Our Bajra Khichdi Mix combines pearl millet with carefully selected lentils and spices for a hearty, traditional Indian meal.

name: Multi Millet Flour
shortDesc: A pure blend of 5 different millets for everyday cooking.
description: Upgrade your rotis with our Multi Millet Flour. An equal proportion blend of Finger, Pearl, Sorghum, Foxtail, and Barnyard millets to give you complete daily nutrition.

name: Barnyard Millet Rice
shortDesc: The perfect low-carb rice alternative.
description: An excellent replacement for white rice. Fast cooking, light on the stomach, and extremely nutritious. Ideal for upma, pongal, or as a rice substitute.

name: Multigrain Health Mix Powder
shortDesc: Traditional health drink mix with 15+ natural ingredients.
description: A traditional Indian nutritious blend made with cereals, pulses, and nuts. Perfect for breakfast as a porridge or a health drink for the whole family.

name: Protein Nutri Mix
shortDesc: Plant-based protein powder for active lifestyle.
description: 100% natural, plant-based protein powder made from sprouted grains and nuts. Formulated without any artificial sugars or flavors to support muscle repair.

name: Sprouted Ragi Health Mix
shortDesc: Highly bioavailable nutrients from sprouted ragi.
description: Sprouting ragi multiplies its nutritional value and makes it easier to digest. An excellent weaning food for babies and a calcium booster for elders.

name: Vegetable Soup Mix
shortDesc: Instant, naturally dehydrated vegetable soup.
description: A comforting, warm cup of soup packed with real dehydrated vegetables, millets, and natural spices. No cornstarch or artificial thickeners.

name: Detox Drink Mix
shortDesc: Daily morning cleanse with natural herbs and spices.
description: Start your day right with this blend of turmeric, ginger, black pepper, and other digestive spices designed to detoxify your system.

name: Dry Fruit Laddu (No Sugar)
shortDesc: Naturally sweetened with dates, loaded with premium nuts.
description: A guilt-free sweet treat. These laddus contain zero refined sugar and are packed with almonds, cashews, pistachios, dates, and figs.

name: Ragi Sesame Laddu
shortDesc: Traditional sweet with jaggery, ragi, and sesame.
description: The perfect post-meal sweet. A combination of roasted ragi, sesame seeds, and pure jaggery provides immense nutritional benefits and satisfies cravings.

name: Millet Murukku
shortDesc: Crunchy, savory snack made from mixed millets.
description: A healthier alternative to regular deep-fried snacks. Our murukku is made primarily with millet flour and cold-pressed oil for a crispy, guilt-free crunch.

name: peri peri Makhana
shortDesc: Crispy roasted fox nuts with tangy spices.
description: The ultimate healthy movie-time snack! Premium quality makhana slowly roasted to perfection and lightly seasoned with natural spices.

name: Energy Bites (Dates & Nuts)
shortDesc: Pocket-sized energy boosters for the go.
description: Perfect pre-workout or mid-day snack. These bite-sized energy balls give you an instant boost of clean energy without any processed ingredients.

name: Moringa Powder
shortDesc: 100% organic drumstick leaf powder.
description: The ultimate superfood! Our shade-dried moringa powder retains maximum nutrients. Add it to your smoothies, juices, or curries for a massive nutritional boost.

name: Amla Powder
shortDesc: Pure Indian gooseberry powder for hair and immunity.
description: Nature's richest source of Vitamin C. Consume internally for immunity building or use externally as a hair mask to promote healthy hair growth.

name: Ginger Detox Tea
shortDesc: Soothing herbal tea blend with ginger root.
description: A caffeine-free herbal infusion combining dry ginger, tulsi, and lemongrass. Extremely soothing for the throat and excellent for digestion after heavy meals.

name: Japanese Matcha
shortDesc: Premium ceremonial grade matcha green tea.
description: Authentic, vibrant green matcha sourced directly from Japan. Offers calm, focused energy and a massive dose of antioxidants without the coffee jitters.

name: Tulsi Green Tea
shortDesc: Refreshing whole leaf green tea with holy basil.
description: A stress-relieving blend of premium green tea leaves and holy basil (Tulsi). Helps reduce stress and supports healthy immune function.
